description: Merged well options for the selected fleet and pad.
sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT name AS label, name AS value, well_family, fleet_name, pad_name, fleet_name AS fleet_name_option, pad_name AS pad_name_option, well_id, api_num, stage_count * 300 AS sample_count, CAST(to_timestamp(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST('2024-06-01 08:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP)) + (0)) AS TIMESTAMP) AS first_record_ts, CAST(to_timestamp(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST('2024-06-01 08:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP)) + ((stage_count - 1) * 1800 + 1200)) AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_record_ts FROM (VALUES ('Alpha 1H','Alpha 1','Fleet Alpha','Pad A-1',101,'42-001-0001',6), ('Alpha 2H','Alpha 2','Fleet Alpha','Pad A-1',102,'42-001-0002',6), ('Alpha 3H','Alpha 3','Fleet Alpha','Pad A-2',103,'42-001-0003',5), ('Bravo 1H','Bravo 1','Fleet Bravo','Pad B-1',201,'42-002-0001',6), ('Bravo 2H','Bravo 2','Fleet Bravo','Pad B-1',202,'42-002-0002',4)) AS w(name, well_family, fleet_name, pad_name, well_id, api_num, stage_count) WHERE fleet_name = :fleet_name AND pad_name = :pad_name ORDER BY name ) q
